features.name: module instantiation within layer-generated module with bind
features.description: Code should include a module instantiated inside a layer-generated module, where the instantiated module has its own layer with bind operations

features.name: bind under bind pattern with layer-generated modules
features.description: Code should include bind statements where a module instantiated within one bind context is itself a target of another bind, creating illegal bind-under-bind
features.snippet: bind Foo Foo_A foo_A(); bind Bar Bar_B bar_B();
